title: Opening for Software Engineer at Manipal Digital Health Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at Manipal Digital Health Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Join the Manipal Digital Health Holdings Services family as a Software Engineer in Raipur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Manipal Digital Health Holdings Services:
Manipal Digital Health Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manipal Digital Health Holdings Services!
